7273","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统】+【合成】+【爽文】+【军队】+【无女主】【军队争霸】
本书又名：靠合成打穿世界的小子真的很加分。
坏消息：穿越了
好消息：有合成系统
坏消息：穿越过来就已经在征兵路上了
好消息：原身能文能武，一个人摇摆一个山头的土匪。
作为穆家乡唯一的希望，穆青带着五十子弟兵如同泥鳅滚入了泥潭，将草原搅弄的一片狼藉。
人之精华合成路线：一星【吃苦耐劳】-二星【坚韧不拔】-三星【百折不挠】-四星【坚毅不屈】-五星【固若金汤】-六星【钢筋铁骨】
羊之精华合成路线：一星【群居适应】-二星【高山跳跃】-三星【驱羊战狼】-四星【羊如猛虎】-五星【羊战群狼】-六星【破晓战羊】-七星【神魂尊羊】
马之精华合成路线：一星【一马当先】-二星【马踏飞燕】-三星【风驰电掣】-四星【铁骑突出】-五星【阵马风樯】
臣子：他只手遮天，亲王都能先斩后奏。
皇帝：有他在，朕只需要躺好就行，我俩互为义父。
间谍：陛下，穆青要谋反！
皇帝：那就杀了吧！
间谍：那我去传令让穆青进宫！
皇帝：不用，杀你朕能做主。
间谍：？
穆青跨马持刀，誓要打穿整个天下。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/959ea46780e16f063dc0537b60cc2a3f","author":"王五棍","author_id":"","book_id":"7441072818898357273","book_name":"杀戮能变强我把自己炼成人族天灾","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7441084648798568985","read_count":"15611","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1184508"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"570","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无女主,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ccdf9ad505476324c0de7b48edca4871~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395501&x-signature=%2BKYASxl3Voj9iEyZ%2FpLN%2FDsYny0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3237430174953243","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"127"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230431419C15EF42E0865BB6AC3C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen
